title: cryptantha parvula
intro: Cryptantha parvula, a small annual herbaceous plant, is a species of flowering plant in the borage family (Boraginaceae). It is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico, and is often found growing in dry areas and along roadsides. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial compounds that may help to soothe digestive issues and reduce fever. Preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for its health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving respiratory health, to be harnessed.
